summary: Guías de Remisión module testing completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly. The bugs mentioned in the review request (URL mismatch, response parsing, field names, date filters) have been confirmed as FIXED.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/guias-remision - returns array with enriched fields (numero_guia, fecha, modelo_nombre, servicio_nombre, persona_nombre, cantidad)
Backend: GET /api/guias-remision - filter by registro_id works correctly
Backend: GET /api/guias-remision - filter by persona_id works correctly
Backend: GET /api/guias-remision/{id} - returns detail with enriched data (persona_telefono, persona_direccion, registro_n_corte, tallas)
Backend: GET /api/guias-remision/{invalid_id} - returns 404
Backend: POST /api/guias-remision/from-movimiento/{id} - creates new guía with enriched data
Backend: POST /api/guias-remision/from-movimiento/{id} - updates existing guía (no duplicates)
Backend: POST /api/guias-remision/from-movimiento/{invalid_id} - returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/guias-remision/{id} - deletes guía successfully
Backend: Guías use 'fecha' field (not 'fecha_emision')
Frontend: Guías de Remisión page (/guias) loads correctly with KPIs, filters, and table
Frontend: KPIs show Total Guías, Total Prendas Enviadas, Destinatarios
Frontend: Filters (Registro, Destinatario, Fecha Desde, Fecha Hasta) are present and functional
Frontend: Table displays numero_guia (GR-XXXXXX format), fecha, registro, servicio, destinatario, cantidad
Frontend: View modal opens and shows GUÍA DE REMISIÓN title, numero_guia, fecha, registro info, destinatario, cantidad, firma sections
Frontend: Print button present in modal
Frontend: Date filters use 'fecha' field correctly
Frontend: RegistroForm - Movimientos de Producción section displays correctly
Frontend: RegistroForm - FileText (Generar Guía) button present in movimientos actions
Frontend: RegistroForm - Clicking Generar Guía shows toast 'Guía GR-XXXXXX lista para imprimir'
critical_code_review_comments: All reported bugs have been verified as FIXED:
1. URL endpoint: Frontend correctly calls '/from-movimiento/' matching backend route
2. Response parsing: Frontend correctly uses response.data.guia for from-movimiento endpoint
3. Field names: Frontend uses 'numero_guia' and 'fecha' (not 'numero' or 'fecha_emision')
4. Date filters: Frontend filters use 'fecha' field correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing guía GR-000001 created during manual testing. Registro 04 (e7082b07-7a9b-4b45-af14-bde1ebc09238) has 2 movimientos: Lavanderia with Antartida and Corte with Roger.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guías de Remisión module fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/guias-remision (list with filters), GET /api/guias-remision/{id} (detail), POST /api/guias-remision/from-movimiento/{movimiento_id} (create/update), DELETE /api/guias-remision/{id}. Frontend: /guias page with KPIs, filters, table, view modal with print. RegistroForm has Generar Guía button in movimientos section. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_guias_remision.py with 11 tests.
rca_of_the_issue: The original bugs were: (1) URL mismatch - frontend called '/desde-movimiento/' but backend had '/from-movimiento/', (2) Response parsing - frontend used response.data instead of response.data.guia, (3) Field names - frontend used 'numero' instead of 'numero_guia' and 'fecha_emision' instead of 'fecha', (4) Date filters used wrong field. All these have been fixed by the main agent.
